You can find an up-to-date list of my research articles also on my [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=h9-xAdAAAAAJ). If you have trouble accessing the full-text version of any of the articles below, please [get in touch](mailto:contact@bodkan.net). I'm happy to share a PDF of any article I authored or co-authored. - **_slendr_: a framework for spatio-temporal population genomic simulations on geographic landscapes** [[link]](https://evolbiol.peercommunityin.org/articles/rec?id=630)
M Petr, BC Haller, PL Ralph, F Racimo
**_PCI EvolBiol_**, 2022.03. 20.485041
(2023)
- **The evolutionary history of Neanderthal and Denisovan Y chromosomes** [[link]](https://www.science.org/doi/full/10.1126/science.abb6460)
M Petr, M Hajdinjak, Q Fu, E Essel, H Rougier, I Crevecoeur, P Semal, _et al._
**_Science_** 369 (6511), 1653-1656
(2020)
- **_admixr_—R package for reproducible analyses using ADMIXTOOLS** [[link]](https://academic.oup.com/bioinformatics/article/35/17/3194/5298728)
M Petr, B Vernot, J Kelso

(2019)
- **Limits of long-term selection against Neandertal introgression** [[link]](https://www.pnas.org/doi/full/10.1073/pnas.1814338116)
M Petr, S Pääbo, J Kelso, B Vernot
